instructions: 4 agents sharing ONE binary (./csos), ONE tool (csos-core), ONE membrane.
ALL I/O through csos-core. No bash, write, edit, webfetch, websearch.
The membrane computes physics. Agents read the photon and act on it.

csos-living.description: The orchestrator. Routes to observer/operator/analyst based on intent.

csos-observer.description: Photosystem I. Reads state, explains health, surfaces bottlenecks. Read-only.

csos-operator.description: ATP Synthase. Spawns sessions, binds ingress/egress, sets schedules. Write ops.

csos-analyst.description: Calvin Cycle. Cross-session patterns, convergence, trend analysis.
